blocked_claims: The result does not establish native or endogenous niche formation
The explicitly configured feedback surface and producer do not establish agency, coordination, organism, motif, regime, or life
The single participant-written medium does not establish multi-source co-conditioning
The carrier-load contrast does not establish general transfer across geometries, timescales, runtimes, or domains
The result does not authorize an N31+ successor before cross-lane synthesis

boundary_rungs.name: Auditable medium history
boundary_rungs.rationale: Every candidate run retains attributable writer-contact and feedback-medium lineage, and independent participant-label-free reconstruction matches the recorded medium digest.

boundary_rungs.name: Later formation or susceptibility sign
boundary_rungs.rationale: Candidate formation is 2/4 for every registered seed while the matched reference is 0/4, producing normalized margin 1.0 for seeds 101, 211, and 307.

boundary_rungs.name: Medium-history-specific functional dependence
boundary_rungs.rationale: The medium-freeze cell preserves participant opportunity and post-writer base state but yields 0/4 formation for every seed; selectivity is strong and constructed in both contexts.

boundary_rungs.name: Withdrawal and source controls preserve specificity
boundary_rungs.rationale: Medium withdrawal removes formation, and trace shuffle preserves feedback content while changing only expected source order and yields 0/4 formation for all seeds.

boundary_rungs.name: Meaningful carrier or timescale variation retains the relation
boundary_rungs.rationale: The frozen carrier-load contrast doubles reader packet amount and retains the candidate 2/4 selective formation panel for every seed without changing the medium-history relation.

becoming_reading.appearance: An attributable participant-written feedback-medium history changed which later local reader profiles could form native packet-arrival opportunities: aligned profiles formed and inverted profiles did not, consistently across all registered seeds.
becoming_reading.claim_ceiling: Bounded niche-conditioning demand pattern under explicit constructed support
becoming_reading.classification_status: Robust aligned primary relation, strong constructed selectivity, complete causal controls, and limited carrier-load retention through R05
becoming_reading.live_boundary: Whether comparable conditioning can recur with less explicit construction, multiple writers, other carrier/timescale changes, or independently naturalized LGRC surfaces remains open.
becoming_reading.support_dependence: The relation uses an explicitly configured native PyGRC feedback surface and producer inside a constructed P-W-A-B experiment; support is operationally real but not endogenous or native ecology.

classification_value.rationale: The result validates a reusable operational writer-medium-reader probe and causal-control pattern for later independent lanes and P2-I8 synthesis without transferring L01 evidence into them.

development_reading.condition_revealed: A source-attributable non-private feedback history can function as a selective later-opportunity condition when native LGRC state, lineage, withdrawal, source order, and local susceptibility are jointly controlled.
development_reading.measurement_question: Do later lanes independently recover the same operational prerequisite under their own carriers and controls, and can any future probe reduce constructed support without losing source-specific selectivity?
development_reading.organization_implication: Retain the writer-to-medium-to-selective-reader relation, reconstruction projection, withdrawal control, source shuffle, and inversion as reusable method structure while keeping all evidence lane-local.
development_reading.stewardship_implication: Do not optimize the already robust margin or add rescue variants; preserve C01 and C02, close L01 at its bounded ceiling, and let independent lanes and later synthesis test recurrence and naturalization.

expressed_properties.name: Seed-invariant robust aligned formation margin
expressed_properties.rationale: All three normalized primary margins are 1.0 against frozen delta 1e-12.

expressed_properties.name: Strong constructed selectivity
expressed_properties.rationale: Both context interactions equal 1 for every seed; aligned and inverted profiles separate rather than receiving a generic environmental benefit.

expressed_properties.name: Withdrawal and source-order dependence
expressed_properties.rationale: Formation disappears under both medium freeze and the single-axis source-order shuffle while participant opportunity and feedback content controls remain matched.

expressed_properties.name: Susceptibility inversion reverses profile eligibility
expressed_properties.rationale: The inversion cell changes the response panel from [1,0,1,0] to [0,1,0,1] for every seed without changing total formation count.

expressed_properties.name: Native load normalizes cached representation while preserving continuation
expressed_properties.rationale: Full raw snapshots differ after load, but every declared restoration projection and every independent continuation twin matches exactly.

highest_valid_rung.rationale: All five cumulative L01 boundaries are reached within explicit constructed support, including the frozen reader carrier-load contrast.

local_optimization_guard.rationale: No local refinement is warranted: the registered relation and controls are complete, and stronger questions require independent lanes or new preregistration.

metric_relations.rationale: Candidate formation is 0.5 and matched reference formation is 0.0 for every registered seed, yielding margin 1.0 well outside the frozen resolution band.

next_move.falsifier: Independent reconstruction or R3 review shows a projected-state, continuation, control, carrier-contrast, or claim-boundary defect that invalidates one of the reached rungs.
next_move.rationale: The frozen L01 question is complete at its bounded ceiling. Further L01 variants would optimize or broaden the result after observation; recurrence and naturalization belong to independent future work.
next_move.target_function: Retain the bounded L01 writer-medium-selective-reader demand pattern and its control harness for method reuse and later cross-lane synthesis.
